name: Hbis Company Limited
summary: Hbis Company Limited produces and sells steel products in China. The company's products include hot and cold rolled coils, pickling rolls, galvanized coated coils, medium and wide plates, bars, wires, steel profiles, and steel strips. Its products are used in automobiles, home appliances, pipelines, bridges, machinery manufacturing, warehousing, and other fields. Hbis Company Limited is based in Shijiazhuang, China.
